name: Fihirisar Shock
description: Mai nuna lamba mai sauri na kwanciyar hankali na hemodynamic. An ƙididdige shi azaman HR / SBP. Na al'ada shine 0.5-0.7.
instructions: Raba bugun zuciya ta hanyar hawan jini na systolic. Fihirisar girgiza mai tashi yana nuna tabarbarewa.

scoring.label: Matsakaicin girgiza -- isa ga IV, ruwaye
Matsanancin girgiza -- farfaɗo da sauri, samfuran jini

obstetric.note: Indexididdigar Shock Obstetric (OSI) tana amfani da dabara iri ɗaya. SI> 0.9 a cikin marasa lafiya masu ciki yana da mahimmanci. HR na al'ada ya fi girma a cikin ciki (80-100 bpm).
